---
title: "Talks"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(knitr)
options(knitr.table.format = "html")
```

::: {.intro-block .talks-intro}
::: {.eyebrow}
Talks
:::

::: {.lead}
Invited lectures, workshop talks, conference presentations, and commentaries across philosophy of science, causation, and configurational methods.
:::
:::

::: {.vita-card .talks-card}
## Talks

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
talk <- read.csv(file="talks.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ",")
colnames(talk) <- c("Date", "Topic/Location")
kable(
  talk,
  format = "html",
  escape = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Date", "Talk / Location"),
  table.attr = 'class="vita-position-table talks-table"'
)
```
:::
